MixSwitchEpi 0.0.9.500
  • Reference
    • MixSwitchEpi
    • Comparing Homogeneous and Heterogeneous Epidemics

Package index

Core Simulation & Framework

Main epidemic models and high-level simulation entry points.

run_system_wparms()
Run the system and produce neat output
seirs_act()
SEIRS Activity Model Generator
main_f()
Demo function for plotting
run_combination()
Run and record a 2D parameter scan
scan_mixswitch_framework()
Scan 2D parameter space (epsilon × switch_rate.
scalar_reference()
Homogeneous SEIR trajectory (mass-action)
haslemere_empirical()
Empirical Haslemere scan
haslemere_grid()
Haslemere grid scan
haslemere_mix_parms()
Forces proportionate (random) mixing in Haslemere activity classes Hence epsilon = 0
seir_model()
Homogeneous SEIR model
metaroutine()
Run a standard set of routines
plot_combin()
Plot combined results

Parameter Management

Functions for creating, calibrating, and managing model parameters.

make_parms()
Make a default parameterisaiton
calibrate_parms()
Changes the β value until the target R0 is met
basic_scalar_parms()
Get the scalar epi parameters for given pathogen
make_homogeneous_parms()
Make homogeneous parameters
make_initial_conditions()
Make the initial conditions
make_initial_guess()
Make an initial guess of an 'effective' mixing matrix
make_initial_specific()
Specific activity class infected first.
make_initial_uniform()
Initial conditions where each compartment is inoculated simultaenously with an equal fraction of exposed individuals (or, rather, stuff...)
activity_empirical()
Retrieve fitted activity scores for a given setting
activity_linear()
Generate the activity-class scaler for each activity class Linear activity scores
activity_null()
Generate a null activity vector
find_gamma_expectations()
Find expected values (means) within gamma distribution bins
make_generator()
Make a generator matrix

Mixing & Contact Models

Generative models for contact/mixing matrices within and between activity classes.

garnett_mixing()
parameterically generate mixing matrix for the desired number ofactivity classes
exponential_mixing()
Parameterically generate exponential mixing model
polynomial_mixing()
Parametrically generate mixing matrix for the desired
make_contact_matrix()
Construct the contact matrix
generate_mixingmat()
Generate a mixing/contact matrix with selectable model
rho_matrix()
Generates the rho matrix from parameters

Switching Dynamics

Rate matrices defining movement between activity classes.

simple_switching()
Make the simplest possible switching matrix.
adjacent_switching()
Switching matrix where you can only move between adjacent classes
adjacent_switching_wrapped()
Switching matrix where you can only move between adjacent classes but wraps lowest and highest activities.
elaborated_switching()
Elaborated switching
make_switch_matrix()
Make the switching matrix according to supplied model

Epidemic Metrics & Analytics

Functions to calculate R0, Rt, and characterise epidemic outcomes.

compute_r0()
Computes the next-generation matrix and R0
compute_rt()
Computes the Rt using the population state at a particular time t
compute_rt_ts()
Compute R0 and Rt time series from model output
compute_all()
Wrapper function to compute all metrics
compute_hit()
Compute empirical herd immunity threshold (HIT)
compute_homogeneous_metrics()
Computes the outcome metrics for a homogeneous population
compute_ngm()
Constructs the next-generation matrix
compute_r0_static()
Compute R0 from a static mixing matrix and scalar parameters
compute_ttprev()
Compute time to threshold prevalence
characterise_peaks()
Characterise epidemic peaks for total and by class
characterise_end()
Compute epidemic duration and final size
compute_spectral_gap()
spectral gap calculation
spectral_radius()
Convienience function to compute the spectral radius of a matrix
t_matrix()
Generates the T matrix from parameters
t_entry()
Generates a single entry of the T matrix
sigma_matrix()
Makes the sigma matrix
check_fraction_exposed()
Sanitise the exposed fraction
find_peaks()
Find epidemic peaks (for I or E + I)
find_steadystate()
Find the steady-state distribution of a continuous-time Markov chain given its transition rate matrix W.
homogeneous_metrics()
Metrics for homogeneous SEIR epidemic

Visualisation & Comparison

Plotting tools for trajectories, heatmaps, and model comparisons.

plot_epidemic_annotated()
Plot epidemic course with annotated metrics
plot_epidemic_faceted()
Plot all compartments (SEIR) separately
plot_epidemic_with_rt()
Combined plot of epidemic trajectory and Rt
plot_haslemere_grid()
Plot the grid of (e.g.,) Haslemere results
plot_rt_timeseries()
Plot Rt over time with R0 reference line
plot_2d_heatmaps()
Plot 2D heatmaps of epidemic metrics
plot_sweep_results_1d()
Plot 1D parameter sweeps
curve_comparison()
Compare SEIR curves across models, using the palette to colour the curves by model type. This is a more direct comparison of the epidemic trajectories than the bar_comparison of summary metrics, and can reveal differences in timing and shape of the epidemics that may not be captured by summary metrics alone. Facets by S, e, i ,r and plots the occupancy for each of those states for each model .
bar_comparison()
Bar comparison of outcome metrics across models
compare_curves_main()
Main comparison: faceted SEIR curves (left) + grouped metric bars (right)
homogeneous_curve()
Plot homogeneous mass action model
multi_outcome_comparison()
Multi-outcome 2-D comparison heatmaps
example_comp()
Example comparison scan and plot
save_heatmaps()
Save all heatmap plots
make_metric_comparison()
Metric comparison across models

Structural Approximations

Mapping complex heterogeneous models to simpler parametric approximations.

approx_epsilon()
Apperoximate a switching system with a no-switch system using a single scalar epsilon parameter for assortativity/proportionate mixing.
approx_both()
Approximate a switching system with a no-switch system using both minimally constrained contact matrix and epsilon-constrained approximations.
approx_minimally_constrained()
Approximate a switching system with a minimally constrained contact matrix with no switching
compare_approx()
Function to plot the approximated system against the original system
approximation_error()
Characterise error in approximations across parameter space
fit_noswitch()
Fit non-switching system
score_difference()
Score difference between model outputs

Utilities & Data Handling

Helper functions for state manipulation, file export, and internal formatting.

neaten_state()
Neaten up the dust2 output into a data.table
declass()
Simplifies epidemic output
kronecker_delta()
kronecker_delta
get_info()
Convenience function to get population info from model output
write_epidemic()
Writes out the epidemic to a csv
pivot_seir()
Pivot SEIR epidemic df + prepare for plotting
scale_results()
Compute how synchronised epidemic peaks are Scale results by occupancy fraction for each activity class
mat_from_vec()
Make a matrix suitable for use as a contact matrix from a supplied vector
vec_from_mat()
Make a vector for input into optimisation fun.
report_scan_results()
Report the parameter scan results
display_mix_switch()
Pretty-print contact and switching matrices

On this page
